name: Pasta with Couscous Salad and Peanut Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil a large pot of water and cook pasta until al dente.
2. While pasta is cooking, stir together dry couscous and stock or water in a small bowl. Let stand, covered, until liquid is completely absorbed, about 5 to 10 minutes. Toss lightly with a fork.
3. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, toss together remaining salad ingredients.
4. Drain pasta well and rinse under cold water. Drain again.
5. Add cooked pasta with couscous to the salad ingredients.
6. Pour on dressing; toss again.
7. Top with garnish of orange slices, mandarin orange segments, or pineapple slices and raisins, optional.
